title: Vaa Ponmayile Song Lyrics Poonthalir
stanzas:
Vaa pon mayile
nenjam yaekkathil thavikkudhu
endrum nee indri naanillai
naan indri nee illai kanmani...

kaniye manam mayanga mayanga
varuvaai suvai peruga peruga
ilamaiyin naliname
inimaiyin uruvam

Vaa pon mayile
nenjam yaekkathil thavikkudhu
endrum nee indri naanillai
naan indri nee illai kanmani...

azhage sugam valara valara
ninaive dhinam pazhaga pazhaga
urimaiyil azhaikkiren
uyiyile kalandhu magizha vaa

Vaa pon mayile
nenjam yaekkathil thavikkudhu
endrum nee indri naanillai
naan indri nee illai kanmani...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vaa Ponmayile'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between lovers.

What is the context of this song in the movie Poonthalir?

In Poonthalir, the song reflects the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the film's emotional narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S.P. Balasubramaniam and composed by Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Vaa Ponmayile' released?

The song was released on February 10, 1979.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Poonthalir, 'Vaa Ponmayile' serves as a poignant expression of love, capturing the essence of romantic yearning. The lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and deep emotional connection, making it a favorite among listeners. With S.P. Balasubramaniam's soulful rendition and Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, the song resonates with anyone who has experienced love's bittersweet moments. It beautifully conveys the message that love transcends time and space.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaa Ponmayile is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully rendered by the legendary S.P. Balasubramaniam. The song's enchanting lyrics and soulful composition by Ilaiyaraaja create an unforgettable listening experience. Dive into the emotional depths of Poonthalir and let the music transport you to a world of romance.
stanzaMeanings: Come, my heart is always restless without you, I am nothing without you, my dear...
Come, my heart is always restless.
The beauty of love is in the eyes, like the brightness of the temple's light in the morning.
Oh dear, the heart will wander and bring joy, the sweetness will grow, the essence of youth is the shape of happiness.
Come, my heart is always restless without you, I am nothing without you, my dear...
Come, my heart is always restless.
Come, my heart is always restless.
The yellow color of the body is like the sky... the blue color of the earth is like the eyes.
Beauty grows and flourishes, I call out daily in the past, merging with life, come and rejoice.
Come, my heart is always restless without you, I am nothing without you, my dear...
Come, my heart is always restless.
